summary.goal: Add MongoDB collections for BattleHistory and BattleTurn (closes #11)
decisions: used ReferenceFields for pokemon_one/pokemon_two/winner/first_attacker rather than storing string IDs, consistent with how Ownership references User and Pokemon
named fields started_at/ended_at to match caught_at convention already in the codebase; turn_number over turn_index because it reads as a count not an array position
